name: Pomelo
description: LatAm card-issuing and BaaS platform providing APIs to issue credit, debit, and prepaid cards across the region.

seo.title: Pomelo — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Pomelo: LatAm card-issuing and BaaS platform providing APIs to issue credit, debit, and prepaid cards across the region.

when_to_use: Issuing credit and prepaid Visa/Mastercard cards across LatAm
Launching BaaS card products for Latin American fintechs
Virtual card issuance API for LatAm embedded finance apps

review.verdict: Best-in-class LatAm issuer BaaS, but scoped for well-funded fintechs, not SMBs or early-stage teams.
review.best_for: LatAm fintechs launching branded credit, debit, or prepaid cards across the region
review.not_for: Small teams, acquirers, or merchants not launching card programs
